articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
articles.description: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

images.name: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
images.caption: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

keyEvents.text: Bruno Onyemaechi (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Salis Abdul Samed (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Nigeria 1, Ghana 0. Cyriel Dessers (Nigeria) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Ghana. Ebenezer Annan replaces Iddrisu Baba.
Substitution, Ghana. Tariq Lamptey replaces Patrick Kpozo.
Jerome Opoku (Ghana) is shown the red card for violent conduct.
Substitution, Ghana. Kasim Adams replaces Amankwah Forson.
Substitution, Nigeria. Moses Simon replaces Cyriel Dessers.
Substitution, Nigeria. Raphael Onyedika replaces Wilfred Ndidi.
Substitution, Nigeria. Ademola Lookman replaces Benjamin Tanimu.
Goal!  Nigeria 2, Ghana 0. Ademola Lookman (Nigeria) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Alex Iwobi.
Substitution, Nigeria. Jamilu Collins replaces Bruno Onyemaechi.
Jamilu Collins (Nigeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Ernest Nuamah.
Goal!  Nigeria 2, Ghana 1. Jordan Ayew (Ghana) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Ghana. Ibrahim Osman replaces Jordan Ayew.
Tariq Lamptey (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
